'''Induran''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ansionian]] who was one of the seven delegates of the [[Unity Council]] on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="The Approaching Storm" />

{{Char-stub}}
